name: Creamy Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the brown sugar, granulated sugar, creamy peanut butter, eggs, and flour.
2. Gradually stir in the milk. Cook over moderate heat, stirring constantly until thick. Do not boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract. Pour into the baked pie shell and chill.
4. Serve with whipped cream.
